case_title: CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICES INC. VS SHOOTER & BUTTS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,295.00 FILED BY CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHOOTER & BUTTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF SEP-29-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHOOTER & BUTTS INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONSOLIDATED DEBRIS BOX SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHOOTER & BUTTS INC. $1,295.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
